query:
INSERT INTO research_field_images (field_name, image_url, prompt) VALUES
('AI & Machine Learning', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663312383643/IwHiJJMtdWLRlZyw.png', 'Abstract visualization of artificial intelligence and machine learning. Neural network patterns, glowing nodes and connections, flowing data streams, circuit board aesthetics, holographic elements.'),
('Human-Computer Interaction', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663312383643/AYYaRcMEjNElSolU.png', 'Abstract visualization of human-computer interaction and user experience design. Flowing interface elements, gesture interactions, touch points, user journey paths, wireframe aesthetics.'),
('Data Science & Analytics', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663312383643/YpUfVrddwfpNNzVn.png', 'Abstract visualization of data science and analytics. Flowing charts, graph lines, data points, statistical visualizations, geometric patterns, dashboard elements.'),
('Information Retrieval & NLP', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663312383643/lvkZjkLeEnMRnbRv.png', 'Abstract visualization of information retrieval and natural language processing. Flowing text streams, word clouds, language patterns, search algorithms, semantic networks.'),
('Social Computing & Networks', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663312383643/ofuFClcRmYLSoZrQ.png', 'Abstract visualization of social computing and networks. Connected nodes, community clusters, network graphs, social connections, communication flows.'),
('Privacy & Security', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663312383643/zsQiKEWbftVumWpU.png', 'Abstract visualization of privacy and security in computing. Shield symbols, encryption patterns, lock mechanisms, secure data flows, cryptographic elements.'),
('Health Informatics', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663312383643/HRhwqLwHCeLQFNvZ.png', 'Abstract visualization of health informatics and medical data. Medical symbols, health data streams, patient records, healthcare networks, bioinformatics patterns.'),
('Education Technology', 'https://files.manuscdn.com/user_upload_by_module/session_file/310519663312383643/xdDSemnoNzEYwliU.png', 'Abstract visualization of education technology and online learning. Digital classroom elements, knowledge networks, learning paths, educational platforms.');
